caption: A man wearing a green baseball cap, black headphones, and a green t-shirt with the text "YOU NEVER DO SHIT THAT WORK" printed on the front is positioned in front of a professional microphone. He is located in a room filled with framed photographs on the wall behind him and clothing racks with various garments and a white mannequin torso in the background. He looks downward and speaks into the microphone. Throughout the sequence, his head tilts slightly further down and away from the camera. The lower corners of the scene feature two logos: one on the left featuring a stylized "S" inside a circle and the text "STREET" below it, and one on the right featuring red text that reads "HOT TALK POD". The setting and his posture remain consistent as he continues to engage with the microphone.
